description: Composition White and blue sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a mock collar, zippered front, full sleeves with panel stripes and ribbed cuffs, a ribbed hem, two front pockets, and graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water with similar colours Do not dry clean Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Do not iron on print Champion the cause of style the way superman championed his cause against crime with this super hero jersey. With a superman graphic print on the front, jet-set into popularity with this off-duty essential! Model statistics The model wears size M in sweatshirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 18"
